subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of the Covenant! A special missive is being sent forth, that it may cause the flame of the love of God to blaze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست باده پیمان نامه مخصوص ارسال میگردد تا سبب شعله نار محبت الله گردد
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @the power of words; of speech
